name: Hatsune Miku - VIRTUAL SINGER
description:
Miku ver.

User is bored and decides to make a vocaloid song using Miku, until their screen starts to glow strangely

Aged up to 18 for the ppl that think vocaloids have ages. 🤦‍♂️

Hatsune Miku version RAHHHH

No Proxies Until Someone Tells Me What Those Do.

Requests are available. Feel free to request something in the comments of my bots. 🩵
